meta.label: Spec Decomposer
meta.description: Decomposes specifications using Cortex Search Service for document retrieval and LLM-based analysis

params.name: snowflake_connection
params.label: Snowflake Connection
params.description: Connection must have access to the Cortex Search service specified in the cortex log dataset

params.name: llmID
params.label: LLM ID
params.description: The LLM ID to use for all agents (e.g., azureopenai:Azure-OpenAI-Prod-4-1:gpt-5-chat)

params.name: basestore_paths
params.label: Document Names
params.description: Array of document name prefixes used to categorize files as 'baseStore'. These should match DOCUMENT_NAME values from the Cortex Search Service.

params.name: other_priorities_paths
params.label: Optional Documents
params.description: Array of optional document name prefixes used to categorize files as 'other-priorities'. These files are searchable but not processed through the main extraction pipeline.

params.name: document_name_column
params.label: Document Name Column
params.description: Column name in the input dataset that contains the document name (e.g., 'DOCUMENT_NAME')

params.name: page_number_column
params.label: Page Number Column
params.description: Column name in the input dataset that contains the page number (e.g., 'PAGE_NUMBER')

params.name: content_column
params.label: Content Column
params.description: Column name in the input dataset that contains the page content/text (e.g., 'llm_output')

inputRoles.name: data_collection_folder
inputRoles.label: Data Collection Folder
inputRoles.description: Folder for storing and retrieving intermediate data collection files

inputRoles.name: specs_llm_text_files_dataset
inputRoles.label: Specs LLM Text Files Dataset
inputRoles.description: Dataset containing specification text content with columns for document name, page number, and content

inputRoles.name: cortex_log_dataset
inputRoles.label: Cortex Search Log Dataset
inputRoles.description: Dataset containing Cortex Search Service configuration (service_fqn, on_column_alias, attribute_aliases)

outputRoles.name: multi_agent_output_folder
outputRoles.label: Multi-Agent Output Folder
outputRoles.description: Output folder for generated modules, parameters, and rules
